care.summary: Lush hanging fern with arching fronds; thrives in humidity and consistent moisture.
care.light: Bright indirect to medium shade; no direct sun
care.water: Keep soil evenly moist; water when top inch feels dry
care.soil: Peaty, well-draining potting mix with organic matter
care.fertilizer: Half-strength liquid fertilizer monthly in spring/summer
common_issues: Brown crispy frond tips from low humidity
Frond drop from cold drafts or under-watering
tips: Mist fronds daily in dry rooms or use a pebble tray
Place in bathrooms for natural humidity
Trim yellow/brown fronds at the base
Rotate pot weekly for even growth
